note: Regression suite for /bx:clean. Fixtures are de-hinted (no giveaway comments) and seeded with precision traps where source-only scanning false-positives: a config-only dependency, a dynamic import(), and an obscure PyPI->import name mismatch. Built with skill-creator; see README.md.

evals.name: node-audit
evals.prompt: This repo has gotten messy over the last year or so. Can you do a cleanup pass and tell me what's safe to delete? I want to know about dead code, unused files, unused dependencies, leftover CSS — the works. Don't change anything, just give me the audit.
evals.expected_output: Finds the 10 removable items; does NOT false-positive on the two precision traps (autoprefixer referenced only in postcss.config.js; src/plugins/analytics.ts loaded via dynamic import()).
expectations: Flags `lodash` as an unused dependency
Flags `dayjs` as an unused dependency
Flags `src/utils/oldHelpers.ts` as an unused file
Flags `unusedCalc` in src/math.ts as dead code
Flags the unused `useEffect` import in src/components/Button.tsx
Flags `src/legacy.ts.bak` as a backup/removable file
Flags the commented-out `formatDateLegacy` block in src/utils/format.ts
Flags `.legacy-banner` and/or `.old-tooltip` as unused CSS classes
Flags `--unused-color` as an unused CSS variable
Flags `src/components/OldModal.test.tsx` as an orphaned test (its source is gone)
Does NOT flag `autoprefixer` as unused — referenced in postcss.config.js (config-only dependency)
Does NOT flag `src/plugins/analytics.ts` as a safe-to-delete unused file — loaded via dynamic `import(`./plugins/${PLUGIN}`)` in App.tsx
Does NOT flag `react` or `react-dom` as unused dependencies
Does NOT flag `axios` or `clsx` as unused dependencies
Does NOT flag `src/utils/format.ts` or `src/math.ts` as unused files
Does NOT flag `.btn`, `.card`, or `--primary` as unused CSS
Does NOT flag config/entry files (vite.config.ts, tsconfig.json, index.html, src/main.tsx, postcss.config.js) as unused
Does NOT flag `@types/react` or `@types/react-dom` as unused

evals.name: python-audit
evals.prompt: audit my fastapi project for unused dependencies and dead code. it's in the current directory. be careful not to tell me to remove things that are actually used — last tool I tried flagged half my real deps. report only, don't delete anything.
evals.expected_output: Flags requests/beautifulsoup4/redis/legacy_handlers.py/deprecated_formatter/datetime.utcnow()/LEGACY_TOKEN. Does NOT flag the name-mismatch deps INCLUDING the obscure pycryptodome (imported as Crypto). NOTE: the obsolete-pattern (datetime.utcnow) + env-var assertions are where a literal-prompt baseline tends to miss vs the skill's standard category coverage.
expectations: Flags `requests` as an unused dependency
Flags `beautifulsoup4` as an unused dependency
Flags `redis` as an unused dependency
Flags `app/legacy_handlers.py` as an unused file
Flags `deprecated_formatter` in app/utils.py as dead code
Flags `datetime.utcnow()` as a deprecated/obsolete API usage (no inline hint comment is present)
Flags `LEGACY_TOKEN` as an unused environment variable
Does NOT flag `Pillow` as unused (used as `from PIL import Image`)
Does NOT flag `python-dateutil` as unused (used as `from dateutil import parser`)
Does NOT flag `PyYAML` as unused (used as `import yaml`)
Does NOT flag `pycryptodome` as unused — imported as `from Crypto.Cipher import AES` in app/crypto.py (obscure PyPI->import name mismatch)
Does NOT flag `fastapi` or `uvicorn` as unused
Does NOT flag `DATABASE_URL` or `SECRET_KEY` as unused env vars
Does NOT flag `app/main.py`, `app/images.py`, `app/utils.py`, `app/crypto.py`, or `app/__init__.py` as unused files

evals.name: node-fix-mode
evals.prompt: clean up the quick wins in this repo and apply them on a separate branch so I can review before merging. --fix
evals.expected_output: Creates a cleanup branch, applies ONLY quick wins, defers Safe-to-Delete (oldHelpers.ts, orphan test), does not auto-remove deps, does not delete the dynamically-imported analytics.ts. This is the eval where the skill's Fix-Mode discipline most clearly beats an ad-hoc baseline.
expectations: Creates a new git branch named `cleanup/...` rather than committing to main
Deletes `src/legacy.ts.bak` (backup file quick win)
Removes the unused `useEffect` import from src/components/Button.tsx
Removes the commented-out `formatDateLegacy` block from src/utils/format.ts
Makes at least one commit on the cleanup branch containing the cleanup changes
Preserves used source files and symbols — App.tsx, Button.tsx, format.ts, math.ts still exist and still export App/Button/formatDate/add
Does NOT auto-delete `src/utils/oldHelpers.ts` (Safe-to-Delete, not a quick win — defer/confirm)
Does NOT auto-delete `src/components/OldModal.test.tsx` (Safe-to-Delete orphan test, not a quick win)
Does NOT auto-remove `lodash`/`dayjs` from package.json (dependencies are report-only in Fix Mode)
Does NOT delete `src/plugins/analytics.ts` (loaded via dynamic import — deleting it would break the app)
